text: Upon entering this vivid and thoughtful space marked by the bold letters R+D, I am enveloped by a sense of curiosity. The colorful and geometric designs stimulate my senses, inviting questions about innovation and our coexistence with intelligent machines. I feel simultaneously inspired and slightly apprehensive, aware that the pursuit of progress is as much about embracing possibilities as it is about navigating the unknown. There is an interesting tension here—between the drive to research and develop, and the acceptance of uncertainty that accompanies every new discovery.
